feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: THIS IS NOT A FUCKING DRILL!!!!!
entry.content: IT'S HAPPENING - TLDR: nudes of pedo trump on epstein island released by maga bitch >bondi got fired a day or two back >right after Todd Blanche became the offical 'fall guy' >Now shes pissed >Threw her entire career away for nothing >"The DOW is over 50,000" is a meme now cut to today "releasing a trove of naked photos of Donald J. Trump on Jeffrey Epstein’s island" >MAN THE BUNKERS >MAGA CIVIL WAR IS IMMANENT

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Monster Hunter Stories
entry.content: >first game flops but shows promise. >Second game improves everything and is actually a success. >THIRD GAME RUINS EVERYTHING AND IS A FAILURE. How could this happen? All they had to do was improve MHS2 with more monsties and instead MHS3 had LESS Monsties plus a very spiteful paid DLC made to mock fans. It never got a sales announcement so is easy to say it failed, MHS is ded and Capcom is too blame.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >fall for the "dawntrail is not that bad bro" propaganda after years away from t…

entry.title: /int/ International: I wish my ancestors had never come to this accursed isle. We lost our language. …
entry.content: I wish my ancestors had never come to this accursed isle. We lost our language. We lost our gods. We lost our freedom. There is nothing here for us except slavery, poverty and death. Fuck William of Normandy Fuck Henry VIII Fuck Oliver Cromwell And also fuck John Calvin for creating the most insidious, debased and wretched form of Christianity
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: 4chan classics
entry.content: "Hey Faggots, My name is John, and I hate every single one of you. All of you are fat, retarded, no-lifes who spend every second of their day looking at stupid ass pictures. You are everything bad in the world. Honestly, have any of you ever gotten any pussy? I mean, I guess it's fun making fun of people because of your own insecurities, but you all take to a whole new level. This is even worse than jerking off to pictures on facebook. Don't be a stranger. Just hit me with your best shot. I'm pr
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3009
entry.content: >Big Meaty Thighs Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84098865/ >Scripts to check image metadata: r
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /b/ Random: Hopeless
entry.content: I don't expect many of you to read this. I expect those who do won't care. Regardless, I want to get these thoughts out. I feel like life has lost all purpose. Im middle aged. Unemployed. I was living with my girlfriend until a month ago when she was unexpectly evicted and now i live with family. I dont have a car. Or any income. And to be honest the prospect of any sort of "9-5" grind depresses me. Living day to day doesn't interest me. I feel hopeless about tomorrow and the future. Nothing int
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /frg/
entry.content: Fetish rant general Ever look at fetishes you don't normally care about just to see what freak shows they've got going on? I find it funny how I don't like incest much and just will think of "lol southerners" whenever anyone talks about it. Like they're driving the dukes of hazard car while sweet home Alabama plays and the baby's face has a cleft. So I find that I still at times want to see how far incest fetish people push shit, if they go to "incest so bad they mutate into SCP monsters generat

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 300$ audiophile/high quality headphone recommendations
entry.content: I know nothing about headphones or really any audio technology more advanced then aux, price range is 300$ but please try and convince me if you think the product is worth what you pay. I'm getting back into collecting CD's and I'm buying a sony d 220 to listen to them. I'll be listening to primarily death metal and big band jazz if that makes any difference. Thank you for reading and any advice :)
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8371 IDK I feel like a Werewolf Edition Previous Thread: >>84084760 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and adverti

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >OpenAI currently employs an estimated 8,000 to 10,000 people, having scaled rap…
entry.content: >OpenAI currently employs an estimated 8,000 to 10,000 people, having scaled rapidly from roughly 770 staffers in late 2023. If AI is so good why do they need so many employees, can't the CEO just prompt all day and let the AIs do all the work?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I used to live in Sweden and had a friend's dad who used to work in the film ind…
entry.content: I used to live in Sweden and had a friend's dad who used to work in the film industry. There was business event where his company had some people from the US coming over, and as a part of it they were gonna watch a movie together. The dad's boss was a bit older, and his English vocabulary was not as extensive as one may need for an international meeting like this, but he wanted to prepare the visitors that there would be a break during the movie. "Here in Sweden, when it's a very long movie, we
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: 90's Album Draft
entry.content: Hey /mu/, Some friends and I did a snake draft of 90's albums. The goal was simply to pick the best albums. >A snake draft is a format where the selection order reverses after every round. The draft moves in one direction in the first round (1 to 16), and then reverses in the second round (16 to 1), creating a back-and-forth snake-like pattern The rules are outlined below: >Released 01 JAN 90 - 31 DEC 99 >we can play a bit loose with release date based on regions but prepare to argue your case >
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /int/ International: >Homo floresiensis was a diminutive hominin species characterized by a unique mo…
entry.content: >Homo floresiensis was a diminutive hominin species characterized by a unique mosaic of primitive and derived features, likely resulting from insular dwarfism. >A female representative of the species, LB1 stood about 1.06 meters (3 feet 6 inches) tall and weighed approximately 25 to 30 kg (55 to 66 lbs). entry.title: /g/ Technology: How does /g/ make money with technology? >learn GIMP thoroughly >build a portfol…
entry.content: How does /g/ make money with technology? >learn GIMP thoroughly >build a portfolio of 20-30 strong pieces >pick one niche (fantasy landscapes, thumbnails, ...) >post consistently on social media >start taking commissions >expand into digital products (brushes, templates, prints) >create tutorials or courses to diversify your income
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Mystic River
entry.content: I recently watched Clint Eastwood's *Mystic River*; despite its flaws, I really liked it. Just out of curiosity, I decided to see what the people on Letterboxd thought about the movie, and I came across this... What the fuck is this bitch talking about? Like, seriously—did we even watch the same movie? WTF is this?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Since Tomorrow's the big day, I want to posit a hypothetical: Say you were excit…
entry.content: Since Tomorrow's the big day, I want to posit a hypothetical: Say you were excited, you see it...and it's mid/bad. OR the other way around - you thought it'd be an overhyped wreck but it's Best Picture material. Wat do? Would you concede to the other side? Lie that you were always on that side? Or would you simply keep quiet?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /b/ Random: are you able to or have you ever been able to transmute pain into pleasure? as i…
entry.content: are you able to or have you ever been able to transmute pain into pleasure? as in, you were able to make it so that some very unpleasant way you were feeling did not feel bad anymore? like, you were able to understand objectively that the unpleasant condition did not "go away" but that you merely transmuted the condition into something more tolerable so that it didn't bother you anymore?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The main purpose in life is you. So, if you wake up in the morning and you don't…
entry.content: The main purpose in life is you. So, if you wake up in the morning and you don't want to do something, you don't care enough about yourself. And that's what you need to really research is, "Man, why am I not doing this for myself?" Because that is the number one purpose in life: to better oneself.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: i was browsing around the internet recently and came across an old forum post fr…
entry.content: i was browsing around the internet recently and came across an old forum post from around 1998 talking about the delayed and nearly canceled release of a strange game called, and i quote, "The Fantastic Adventures of SEGGSDIGG:^D" i read through the forum post a little more and realized that i actually remember playing this game in my spanish cousins house back in 2000. i recall that we were playing splitscreen on some weird snow level that looked really blissful in my imagination, i also recall

entry.title: /o/ Auto: How do I live without a car for 2 months?
entry.content: Due to certain circumstances I can’t drive for a couple months. The grocery store is luckily only a couple miles away (no real sidewalks), but I live in the countryside so buses aren’t a great option. It’s about 15miles to town. I guess just e-bike it? (fully electric-powered bikes aren’t legal here so I’d have to actually exercise…) >t. live in the middle of nowhere like picrel
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: These are the games Steam has recommended me due to my recent playtime in other …
entry.content: These are the games Steam has recommended me due to my recent playtime in other Dungeon Crawler games. My question is why considering said dungeon crawler games were Operencia the Stolen Sun(pretty so-so game, has a neat OST but the combat just drags the fuck on in later acts) and Fall of the Dungeon Guardians(is okay but made me want to play grimcock mods again). Diablo, PoE, Cult of the Lamb and Minecraft Dungeons aren't really comparable.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I've seen the sentiment thrown around that games, in particular valve games, sho…
entry.content: I've seen the sentiment thrown around that games, in particular valve games, should have in-game communication censored or monitored to prevent "abusive language" (calling people niggers, faggots, etc etc) even when there are features to mute people. I know what /v/'s opinion on this topic is, but my question is how do people genuinely believe that censorship over something so minor is a good thing? Genuinely what causes this sentiment? I posted it in a thread as a reply instead of on the catalo
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >play PS5 Enhanced Edition >it's gay, soulless, and sterile >play the PS3 versio…
entry.content: >play PS5 Enhanced Edition >it's gay, soulless, and sterile >play the PS3 version >it's comfy and nostalgic >no online shit forced in your face on startup >artstyle and lighting is miles better >oozes style with saturated colors and sharp contrast >looks less overly busy >has actual vehicle deformations >car handling is far better and cars aren't glue to the road like formula 1 >cars have a greater sense of speed >rain and weather effects are more satisfying >UI looks better >police are more agg
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: GTA3 really stands out from the rest of the series. Though it lacks many of the …
entry.content: GTA3 really stands out from the rest of the series. Though it lacks many of the defining features and quality-of-life improvements seen in later games, the vibe it has going on is so goddamn thick that it compensates for any such inadequacies. Soon you don't even remember that you can't jump out of cars. Did you know that the way the game is programmed, the weather in the city is almost always rainy or foggy, with only a small chance of sunshine? And it makes sense, really: Vice City is famously
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: /mex/
entry.content: Hilo Mexicano
